description_long: This is a modern, freestanding shower fixture with a tall, slender vertical column mounted on a square base. The fixture features a rectangular shower head at the top, attached to a flexible hose that hangs neatly along the side. A prominent horizontal spout extends from the upper section, likely for tub filling or rinsing. The surface is finished in a sleek, matte black, giving it a contemporary and minimalistic appearance. A single lever handle is visible on the side, designed for easy water flow and temperature adjustment. The overall design is streamlined, with clean lines and a robust, stable base suitable for installation in urban outdoor or indoor environments.
description: A tall, freestanding matte black shower fixture with a rectangular shower head, flexible hose, and a single lever handle on a square base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical column, hanging hose, and the rectangular shower head aligned with the base.
description_view_1: Profile view highlighting the horizontal spout extending outward and the slim, linear design of the fixture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the hose hanging on the right and the lever handle visible, emphasizing the fixture's symmetry.
description_view_3: Profile view from the other side, showing the spout and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the column.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a slim, vertical lever located on the side of the column, ergonomically shaped for easy grip and smooth operation, with a matte finish matching the rest of the fixture.
